rationale: Keep because the citing paper’s own note says it "extends construal level and matching research," and its focal constructs (abstract vs. concrete mindset, processing mechanism, behavioral choice outcomes) closely align with the cited paper’s core contribution on how choice construal changes decision processes and outcomes. This looks like a plausible theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental background mention, and the DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.48.1.62) confirms the specific target reference.
